full_text:
Xiahou Jie
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xiahou Jie. Officer of Cao Cao. Panicked when Zhang Fei shouted at him and died. Xiahou Jie was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
